raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/FloatingCo: Agent completion presentation now follows the canonical terminal lifecycle used by PTT and chat.
Notch hover and voice presentation now share a private surface-state boundary; extracting it would broaden view-local ownership.

savePreChatCenterIfNeeded now snaps to the full stored restore frame (origin + glow-inflated size) instead of pairing the inflated-origin with the bare pill size, so the draggable pill no longer drifts ~22pt left / 18pt down per rapid re-open cycle.
Strict concurrency annotations (Ticket 14) add Sendable conformances and isolation qualifiers without changing runtime behavior.
